nodes.name: Webhook - Inbound WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Demo only. Replace path in your own n8n instance. Do not paste live credentials or secret URLs into the shared template.

nodes.name: Set - Normalize Intake Fields
nodes.notes: Keep this generic. Add provider-specific field mapping only in a private copy.

nodes.name: LLM Intake Classification - Placeholder
nodes.notes: Replace this with your private LLM node or model call. Keep prompts and API credentials outside the public demo.

nodes.name: JSON Parse / Validation - Placeholder
nodes.notes: Demo validation only. Paid/private builds should use stricter schema checks.

nodes.name: IF - handoff_required
nodes.notes: True branch goes to human handoff. False branch prepares the next safe intake question.

assignments.name: handoff_notification
assignments.value: PLACEHOLDER_HUMAN_HANDOFF: Review this intake before any reply. Do not provide medical advice, clinic choice, procedure recommendation, or payment handling.

nodes.name: Human Handoff Notification - Placeholder
nodes.notes: Replace with Slack, email, CRM, or queue node only in a private workflow with approved credentials.

assignments.name: reply_text
assignments.value: Thanks. I can help collect trip and communication details, but I cannot provide medical advice or recommend procedures. What are your travel dates, preferred language, budget range, and preferred Seoul area?

nodes.name: Next-Question Reply - Placeholder
nodes.notes: This prepares reply text only. Add a private WhatsApp send node after account approval.

assignments.name: storage_record
assignments.value: ={{ { user_handle: $json.user_handle, message_text: $json.message_text, classification: $json.classification, reply_text: $json.reply_text || null, handoff_notification: $json.handoff_notification || null, received_at: $json.received_at } }}

assignments.name: storage_note
assignments.value: PLACEHOLDER_STORAGE_ONLY: connect Airtable, Sheets, Postgres, Notion, or file storage in a private copy.

nodes.name: Storage - Placeholder
nodes.notes: No external storage is configured in this demo.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, demo_only: true, handoff_required: $json.classification?.handoff_required ?? null, reply_text: $json.reply_text || null, handoff_notification: $json.handoff_notification || null } }}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook - Demo Result
nodes.notes: For local testing only. Do not expose without reviewing privacy and platform policy.
